title: mazus japonicus var. delavayi
intro: Mazus japonicus var. delavayi, also known as Chinese or Japanese mazus, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Mazus japonicus var. delavayi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
